# init(keyPath:observedObject:options:filter:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ XCTest ](/documentation/xctest)

-  init(keyPath:observedObject:options:filter:) 

Initializer# init(keyPath:observedObject:options:filter:)

iOS 13.0+iPadOS 13.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+tvOS 13.0+

```
convenience init(
    keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>,
    observedObject: T,
    options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions = [.initial, .new, .old],
    filter: XCTKeyPathExpectation<T, V>.AsynchronousFilter? = nil
)
```

Available when `T` inherits `NSObject`, `T` conforms to `Sendable`, and `V` conforms to `Sendable`.## [See Also](/documentation/XCTest/XCTKeyPathExpectation/init(keyPath:observedObject:options:filter:)-8noag#see-also)

### [Creating key path expectations](/documentation/XCTest/XCTKeyPathExpectation/init(keyPath:observedObject:options:filter:)-8noag#Creating-key-path-expectations)

[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, expectedValue: V)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:expectedvalue:))Creates an expectation that the system fulfills when the value of the observed property changes to an expected value.[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, predicate: XCTKeyPathExpectation<T, V>.Predicate?)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:predicate:))Creates an expectation that the system fulfills when the value of the observed property changes and satisfies the conditions of a predicate’s evaluation.Deprecated[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, filter: XCTKeyPathExpectation<T, V>.SynchronousFilter?)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:filter:)-plka)[`typealias AsynchronousFilter`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/asynchronousfilter)[`typealias SynchronousFilter`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/synchronousfilter)[`typealias Predicate`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/predicate)A function the key path expectation uses to test the value of an observed property.Deprecated
